allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Start-Process ./dist/Sanduhr/Sanduhr.exe; Start-Sleep 3; $proc = Get-Process Sanduhr -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { Write-Output "RUNNING: PID $\($proc.Id\)"; Stop-Process -Name Sanduhr -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output '\\''Killed.'\\'' } else { Write-Output '\\''NOT RUNNING - process died'\\'' }')
